samples.xml_description: Implement an unsigned 8-bit multiplier based on pipelining processing. Clock. Active-low reset. Input enable. Multiplicand. Multiplier. Output enable. Product. 8 Reset the internal pipeline registers. always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin if (!rst_n) begin mul_en_out_reg <= 0; mul_a_reg <= 0; mul_b_reg <= 0; end end Update the internal pipeline registers. always @(posedge clk) begin mul_en_out_reg <= mul_en_in; mul_a_reg <= mul_a; mul_b_reg <= mul_b; end Generate the partial products. genvar i; generate for (i = 0; i < N; i = i + 1) begin : gen_partial_products assign temp[i] = mul_a_reg && {N{mul_b_reg[i]}}; end endgenerate Calculate the partial sums. genvar j; generate for (j = 0; j < N-1; j = j + 1) begin : gen_partial_sums if (j == 0) begin assign sum[j] = temp[j] + temp[j+1]; end else begin assign sum[j] = sum[j-1] + temp[j+1]; end end endgenerate Calculate the final product. assign mul_out = mul_en_out_reg ? sum[N-2] : 0;
